sources.title: Kabhi Alvida Naa Kehna 2006 Dv DRip X 264 AAC 5.1 Chapters Esub

metadata.Plot: Dev Saran is a disgruntled former footballer who is jealous of his wife Riya's successful career as a fashion magazine editor. Maya Talwar is a kindergarten teacher married to her childhood buddy Rishi. Rishi is a passionate and affectionate husband but Maya is unable to reciprocate his love because of the lack of feelings towards him. A chance encounter brings Dev and Maya together. Since their respective marriages are falling apart, they decide to help each other to salvage their marriages, blissfully unaware of what the forces of love have in store for them. What starts as a pleasant friendship develops into love and an extramarital affair which soon throws the relations between the two couples in turmoil.
metadata.Writer: Karan Johar, Shibani Bathija, Niranjan Iyengar
metadata.Actors: Shah Rukh Khan, Rani Mukerji, Amitabh Bachchan
